evidence_brief.why_account_text: High-fit enterprise account with recent buying signals.
evidence_brief.why_now_text: Leadership change and pricing-page surge in the last 7 days.
evidence_brief.why_persona_text: VP IT plus Security Director match the buying center.
evidence_brief.why_channel_text: Email is valid and recent web engagement suggests reachable interest.

evidence_brief.why_account_text: The account remains active and shows stronger expansion signals.
evidence_brief.why_now_text: A new platform leader creates a concrete why-now window.
evidence_brief.why_persona_text: The Head of Platform is the clearest technical entry point.
evidence_brief.why_channel_text: Email is valid and product intent remains visible.
